description:
India Book (IB) II, 8: Power of attorney to Perahya ha-Kohen to travel to India and sue Abū l-Faraj Nissim b. al-Raqqī for the recovery of goods--primarily textiles--entrusted to said Nissim. 
Location: Fustat. Dating: early 1090s CE. (Information from Goitein and Friedman, p. 301)

See IB II, 2–9: On Abu ’l-Faraj Nissīm, who disappeared in India, with his camphor (Goitein and Friedman, India Traders, 288–290)
tags: India, IB2, ib-untranslated-eng, power of attorney
description_he: ספר הודו II,8: ייפוי כוח לפרחיה הכהן לנסוע להודו ולתבוע מנסים בן אל-רקי החזרת בדים, תחילת שנות ה-1090
